channel.title: Dimension 20
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 on Dropout.tv

item.title: Skirmish Above the Swirling Sea
item.description:
The crew of the Zephyr face a perilous sky battle with the Bank of Fehujar.

Duration: 1:47:35

Tags: Dimension 20, Cloudward Ho!, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, steampunk, victorian era, jules verne, sci-fi, adventures, retro tech, mysteries, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: A Clockwork Crew Rendezvous
item.description:
The Zephyr takes to the skies with new crew in tow, and a mid-air meeting brings unexpected allies.

Duration: 2:16:17

Tags: Dimension 20, Cloudward Ho!, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, steampunk, victorian era, jules verne, sci-fi, adventures, retro tech, mysteries, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Mysteries and The Metal Man
item.description:
The crew hunts for clues to the past in Ramansu, but uncover more about each other than expected.

Duration: 2:33:40

Tags: Dimension 20, Cloudward Ho!, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, steampunk, victorian era, jules verne, sci-fi, adventures, retro tech, mysteries, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Melee Among the Magnamensa
item.description:
The crew battles the Legio Rex in Ramansu, where one wrong move could result in a Zood switcheroo.

Duration: 1:43:02

Tags: Dimension 20, Cloudward Ho!, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, steampunk, victorian era, jules verne, sci-fi, adventures, retro tech, mysteries, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan
